contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: DApp stores pages: pad statuses + Deferred option + clickable filename_original
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/197
  
  Details:
  Three fixes on the DApp stores pages, all triggered by Gary 2026-04-30:
  
  1. stores_by_status.html — Pipeline overview previously rendered only statuses that had >=1 row in the live Hit List. As soon as the field team triages all "AI: Prospect replied" rows, the status disappears from the overview and an operator can't tell whether the status exists at all. Padded the by_status (and by_shop_type) lists with every option in STATUS_OPTIONS / SHOP_TYPE_OPTIONS, with count=0 rendered for missing ones. Sort: nonzero by count desc, then zero rows alphabetically.
  
  2. store_interaction_history.html — status dropdown was missing the "Deferred / Revisit later" option. Added between "On Hold" and "Rejected" so an operator on the per-store editor can mark a row deferred without round-tripping through the spreadsheet.
  
  3. store_interaction_history.html — filename_original (with aliases) was rendering as plain text. For PDF attachments the rendered iframe preview below sometimes fails (Chrome force-downloads when GitHub raw returns application/pdf without Content-Disposition: inline). Now the filename links to the github_blob_url, which always opens in a normal browser tab.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/197
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
